spaces.description: A weatherboarded pavilion perched above a world-famous surf break. Classic Australiana atmosphere for informal beach events and team celebrations.

spaces.name: Midnight Rave Bunker
spaces.description: A purpose-built underground rave bunker with festival-grade sound and lighting. Available for private DJ events, label launch parties, and late-night celebrations.

spaces.name: Silk Road Caravanserai
spaces.description: A restored Central Asian caravanserai with domed ceilings, intricate tilework, and a central open courtyard. Mesmerizing for cultural events and trade launches.

spaces.name: High Line Terrace
spaces.description: A private terrace elevated above the famous High Line walkway with Hudson River views. A stylish New York venue for cocktail parties and brand moments.

spaces.name: The Print Works Studio
spaces.description: A converted Victorian print works with original presses and lead type on display. A characterful setting for creative industry events and literary launches.

spaces.name: Underwater Hotel Lounge
spaces.description: A submersible lounge in an underwater hotel with panoramic views of the Indian Ocean floor. Reserve for a truly one-of-a-kind VIP dining experience.

spaces.name: Palm Court Atrium
spaces.description: An elegant Edwardian palm court atrium with a glass-vaulted ceiling and tinkling fountain. A refined setting for afternoon teas, press days, and charity lunches.

spaces.name: Geodesic Dome Glamping Site
spaces.description: A cluster of five geodesic dome glamping suites in a mountain meadow. Ideal for exclusive multi-day corporate retreats with team workshops included.

spaces.name: Olive Grove Banquet
spaces.description: A long communal dining table set beneath a canopy of ancient olive trees in a working grove. An earthy and romantic setting for outdoor banquets.

spaces.name: Tech Campus Amphitheatre
spaces.description: A state-of-the-art outdoor amphitheatre on a major tech campus. Ideal for all-hands presentations, speaker series, and tech industry panels.

spaces.name: Montmartre Artists' Studio
spaces.description: A historic Montmartre atelier once used by Impressionist painters, filled with natural light and creative energy. Perfect for art workshops and intimate launches.

spaces.name: Lagoon View Overwater Pavilion
spaces.description: An overwater pavilion on stilts above a crystal-clear turquoise lagoon. Stunning for small ceremonies, sunset dinners, and elite incentive groups.

spaces.name: Cornish Tipi Field
spaces.description: A field of luxuriously furnished tipis on the Cornish coast. Magical for outdoor festivals, group retreats, and rustic summer celebrations.

spaces.name: Kasbah Desert Fort
spaces.description: A sand-coloured desert kasbah fort with labyrinthine interiors and rooftop terraces. A dramatic and authentic venue for immersive cultural events.

spaces.name: Penthouse Recording Suite
spaces.description: A luxury penthouse apartment converted into a professional recording suite with Neve console and isolation booths. Unique for music industry events and listening sessions.

spaces.name: City Cloister Courtyard
spaces.description: An inner cloister courtyard in a historic city center convent, draped in bougainvillea and cooled by a fountain. Ideal for private lunches and quiet celebrations.

spaces.name: The Jewel Box Conservatory
spaces.description: A Victorian jewel box conservatory dripping with exotic orchids and specimen ferns. An enchanting and fragrant space for intimate weddings and garden parties.

spaces.name: Watermill Event House
spaces.description: A converted working watermill with millstream, water wheel, and meadow grounds. A picturesque and uniquely relaxing venue for rural celebrations.

spaces.name: Obsidian Sky Lounge
spaces.description: A bold, ultra-dark lounge with obsidian surfaces and star-lit ceiling. A dramatic and exclusive setting for after-hours receptions and VIP dinners.

spaces.name: Solar Panel Eco Hub
spaces.description: A zero-carbon event hub powered entirely by rooftop solar. Purpose-built for sustainability summits, ESG conferences, and green brand launches.

spaces.name: The Marble Hammam
spaces.description: An Ottoman-era marble hammam restored as a private event space. Luminous and atmospheric for wellness events, luxury brand launches, and immersive dinners.

spaces.name: Glacial Lagoon Event Terrace
spaces.description: A terrace overlooking a striking glacial lagoon filled with floating icebergs. An otherworldly setting for small group events and photography expeditions.

spaces.name: Bamboo Pavilion Forest
spaces.description: A series of connected bamboo pavilions open to a dense bamboo forest. A naturally calming space for mindfulness corporate programs and creative retreats.

spaces.name: The Jazz Station
spaces.description: A converted railway station repurposed as a jazz venue with original platform canopy and carriage seating. Ideal for live music events and music industry gatherings.

spaces.name: Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage
spaces.description: A charming converted lighthouse keeper's cottage perched on an Atlantic headland. Perfect for intimate creative residencies and exclusive group retreats.

spaces.name: Floating Cherry Blossom Deck
spaces.description: A purpose-built floating deck moored beneath a forest of cherry blossom trees in spring. A deeply romantic and ephemeral setting for seasonal events.

spaces.name: Solar Pyramid Event Center
spaces.description: A monumental glass pyramid event center with a central oculus and symmetrical wings. A bold and iconic space for large conferences, product unveils, and award ceremonies.
